## Summary
What does this PR add or change?

## Type of change
- [ ] New prompt
- [ ] Edit to existing prompt
- [ ] New example output
- [ ] Documentation / repo structure change
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows the structure in `templates/_prompt-template.md` (Role, Context, Task, Constraints, Output Format)
- [ ] File is named in `kebab-case.md`, verb-first where possible
- [ ] Placed in the correct folder under `/prompts`
- [ ] Ran `python3 scripts/validate-prompts.py` locally and it passes
- [ ] Added/updated an example in `/examples` if applicable

## Additional context
Anything reviewers should know.
